summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that KR is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $66.94. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 58.3%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $68.66 and a significant trendline confluence around $68.39 (formed by 6 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
